data.name: Senior Associate, Banking & Finance (5-7 PQE) - Dubai
data.job_description_text:
Role overview

An established practice is hiring a senior associate for its banking and finance team. The role focuses on lending and debt finance.

Key responsibilities

  • Advising lenders and borrowers
  • Drafting finance documentation

Candidate profile

  • 5 to 7 years PQE in banking and finance
  • Common law qualification

data.name: Corporate Counsel, 8+ PQE, Riyadh
data.job_description_text:
Role overview

A regional group seeks corporate counsel to support its M&A and joint venture activity.

Key responsibilities

  • Leading transaction workstreams
  • Managing external counsel

Candidate profile

  • 8+ years PQE in corporate / M&A
